name: Policies for information security
description: Defines and maintains a set of information security policies, approved by management, published and communicated to relevant parties.
suggested_action: Establish a top-level information security policy plus supporting topic-specific policies, obtain management approval, and review them at planned intervals.

name: Information security roles and responsibilities
description: Defines and allocates information security responsibilities according to organizational needs.
suggested_action: Document and assign security roles and responsibilities in a RACI matrix and reflect them in job descriptions.

name: Segregation of duties
description: Separates conflicting duties and areas of responsibility to reduce the risk of fraud, error and bypassing of controls.
suggested_action: Identify conflicting duties, separate them across individuals, and add compensating controls where full segregation is impractical.

name: Management responsibilities
description: Requires management to ensure all personnel apply information security in accordance with established policies and procedures.
suggested_action: Have management formally endorse security expectations and verify staff adherence to policies and procedures.

name: Contact with authorities
description: Establishes and maintains contact with relevant authorities.
suggested_action: Maintain a documented contact list and procedure for engaging regulators, law enforcement and other authorities.

name: Contact with special interest groups
description: Establishes and maintains contact with special interest groups, security forums and professional associations.
suggested_action: Join relevant security forums and threat-sharing communities and document the engagement process.

name: Threat intelligence
description: Collects and analyzes information relating to information security threats to produce actionable threat intelligence.
suggested_action: Subscribe to credible threat feeds, analyze strategic/tactical/operational intelligence, and feed findings into risk and control decisions.

name: Information security in project management
description: Integrates information security into project management regardless of project type.
suggested_action: Embed security risk assessment and requirements into the project lifecycle and gate reviews.

name: Inventory of information and other associated assets
description: Develops and maintains an inventory of information and other associated assets, including owners.
suggested_action: Maintain an accurate asset inventory with assigned owners and keep it current via automated discovery where possible.

name: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
description: Identifies, documents and implements rules for the acceptable use and handling of information and associated assets.
suggested_action: Publish an acceptable use policy covering handling rules and require acknowledgement by all users.

name: Return of assets
description: Requires personnel and other interested parties to return organizational assets upon change or termination of employment, contract or agreement.
suggested_action: Implement an offboarding checklist that tracks and confirms return of all assets and revocation of access.

name: Classification of information
description: Classifies information according to the information security needs of the organization based on confidentiality, integrity, availability and stakeholder requirements.
suggested_action: Define a classification scheme and classify information assets against it consistently.

name: Labelling of information
description: Develops and implements an appropriate set of procedures for information labelling in accordance with the classification scheme.
suggested_action: Apply consistent labels (physical and electronic) that reflect each information classification level.

name: Information transfer
description: Establishes information transfer rules, procedures and agreements for all types of transfer facilities within and outside the organization.
suggested_action: Define secure transfer rules and agreements covering electronic, physical and verbal information exchange.

name: Access control
description: Establishes and implements rules to control physical and logical access to information and associated assets based on business and security requirements.
suggested_action: Define an access control policy enforcing least privilege and need-to-know across physical and logical access.

name: Identity management
description: Manages the full life cycle of identities.
suggested_action: Implement identity lifecycle management with unique identities and governed provisioning/deprovisioning.

name: Authentication information
description: Controls the allocation and management of authentication information through a management process, including advising personnel on appropriate handling.
suggested_action: Govern secure issuance, storage and handling of authentication information and enforce strong credential practices.

name: Access rights
description: Provisions, reviews, modifies and removes access rights to information and associated assets in accordance with the access control policy.
suggested_action: Operate a formal access request, approval, periodic review and revocation process for all access rights.

name: Information security in supplier relationships
description: Defines and implements processes and procedures to manage the information security risks associated with the use of suppliers' products or services.
suggested_action: Establish a supplier security management process covering risk assessment and ongoing oversight.

name: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
description: Establishes and agrees relevant information security requirements with each supplier based on the type of supplier relationship.
suggested_action: Include defined security requirements, responsibilities and right-to-audit clauses in supplier contracts.

name: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
description: Defines and implements processes and procedures to manage information security risks associated with the ICT products and services supply chain.
suggested_action: Assess and require security assurances across the ICT supply chain, including sub-suppliers and component provenance.

name: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
description: Regularly monitors, reviews, evaluates and manages change in suppliers' information security practices and service delivery.
suggested_action: Schedule supplier service reviews and manage changes to supplier security posture and deliverables.

name: Information security for use of cloud services
description: Establishes processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services in accordance with information security requirements.
suggested_action: Define cloud security requirements, shared-responsibility expectations and a documented cloud exit strategy.

name: Information security incident management planning and preparation
description: Plans and prepares for managing information security incidents by defining, establishing and communicating processes, roles and responsibilities.
suggested_action: Establish an incident management plan defining roles, escalation paths and response procedures, and test it.

name: Assessment and decision on information security events
description: Assesses information security events and decides whether they are to be categorized as information security incidents.
suggested_action: Define triage criteria to assess events and consistently classify which events constitute incidents.

name: Response to information security incidents
description: Responds to information security incidents in accordance with documented procedures.
suggested_action: Execute incident response per documented playbooks, containing, eradicating and recovering from incidents.

name: Learning from information security incidents
description: Uses knowledge gained from information security incidents to strengthen and improve information security controls.
suggested_action: Conduct post-incident reviews and feed lessons learned into control and process improvements.

name: Collection of evidence
description: Establishes and implements procedures for the identification, collection, acquisition and preservation of evidence related to information security events.
suggested_action: Define forensically sound evidence handling and chain-of-custody procedures for security events.

name: Information security during disruption
description: Plans how to maintain information security at an appropriate level during disruption.
suggested_action: Document how security controls are maintained during disruptions and integrate with business continuity planning.

name: ICT readiness for business continuity
description: Plans, implements, maintains and tests ICT readiness based on business continuity objectives and ICT continuity requirements.
suggested_action: Derive ICT continuity requirements from BIA, implement recovery capabilities and test them regularly.

name: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
description: Identifies, documents and keeps up to date the legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements relevant to information security and the approach to meeting them.
suggested_action: Maintain a compliance register of applicable legal and contractual obligations and the controls that satisfy them.

name: Intellectual property rights
description: Implements appropriate procedures to protect intellectual property rights.
suggested_action: Establish procedures to protect IP and ensure compliance with software licensing and copyright.

name: Protection of records
description: Protects records from loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorized access and unauthorized release.
suggested_action: Define records retention and protection controls aligned to legal, regulatory and business needs.

name: Privacy and protection of personal identifiable information (PII)
description: Identifies and meets requirements regarding the preservation of privacy and protection of personal identifiable information according to applicable laws and regulations.
suggested_action: Implement a privacy program addressing PII handling obligations under applicable data protection laws.

name: Independent review of information security
description: Reviews the organization's approach to managing information security and its implementation independently at planned intervals or when significant changes occur.
suggested_action: Schedule independent reviews or audits of the ISMS and act on findings.

name: Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security
description: Regularly reviews compliance with the organization's information security policy, topic-specific policies, rules and standards.
suggested_action: Perform periodic compliance checks against policies and standards and remediate deviations.

name: Documented operating procedures
description: Documents operating procedures for information processing facilities and makes them available to personnel who need them.
suggested_action: Document and maintain operating procedures (SOPs) for information processing activities and make them accessible.

name: Screening
description: Carries out background verification checks on candidates to become personnel prior to and on an ongoing basis, proportionate to business requirements and risk.
suggested_action: Conduct risk-proportionate background screening of candidates in line with laws and ethics.

name: Terms and conditions of employment
description: States the personnel's and the organization's information security responsibilities in the employment contractual agreements.
suggested_action: Include information security responsibilities in employment terms and confidentiality agreements.

name: Information security awareness, education and training
description: Provides personnel and relevant interested parties with appropriate information security awareness, education and training and regular updates of policies relevant to their job function.
suggested_action: Deliver role-relevant security awareness and training on a recurring schedule and track completion.

name: Disciplinary process
description: Formalizes and communicates a disciplinary process to take actions against personnel and other relevant interested parties who have committed an information security policy violation.
suggested_action: Establish and communicate a fair, consistent disciplinary process for security violations.

name: Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
description: Defines, enforces and communicates information security responsibilities and duties that remain valid after termination or change of employment.
suggested_action: Document and communicate ongoing post-employment obligations such as confidentiality and enforce them at offboarding.

name: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements
description: Identifies, documents, regularly reviews and signs confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements reflecting the organization's needs for the protection of information.
suggested_action: Maintain and obtain signed NDAs/confidentiality agreements from personnel and third parties, reviewed periodically.

name: Remote working
description: Implements security measures when personnel are working remotely to protect information accessed, processed or stored outside the organization's premises.
suggested_action: Define a remote working policy with secure connectivity, device and home-environment controls.

name: Information security event reporting
description: Provides a mechanism for personnel to report observed or suspected information security events through appropriate channels in a timely manner.
suggested_action: Provide and publicize easy reporting channels for security events with clear timeliness expectations.

name: Physical security perimeters
description: Defines and uses security perimeters to protect areas that contain information and other associated assets.
suggested_action: Establish defined physical perimeters with barriers around areas holding sensitive assets.

name: Physical entry
description: Protects secure areas by appropriate entry controls and access points.
suggested_action: Implement authenticated entry controls, visitor management and logging at access points to secure areas.

name: Securing offices, rooms and facilities
description: Designs and implements physical security for offices, rooms and facilities.
suggested_action: Apply physical security design measures to offices, rooms and facilities holding sensitive operations.

name: Physical security monitoring
description: Continuously monitors premises for unauthorized physical access.
suggested_action: Deploy surveillance, alarms and monitoring to detect and alert on unauthorized physical access.

name: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
description: Designs and implements protection against physical and environmental threats, such as natural disasters and other intentional or unintentional threats to infrastructure.
suggested_action: Assess and mitigate environmental and physical threats (fire, flood, power, etc.) to facilities.

name: Working in secure areas
description: Designs and implements security measures for working in secure areas.
suggested_action: Define rules and controls governing personnel activity and devices within secure areas.

name: Clear desk and clear screen
description: Defines and enforces clear desk rules for papers and removable storage media and clear screen rules for information processing facilities.
suggested_action: Implement and enforce a clear desk and clear screen policy with automatic screen locking.

name: Equipment siting and protection
description: Sites and protects equipment securely.
suggested_action: Position and protect equipment to reduce environmental, access and tampering risks.

name: Security of assets off-premises
description: Protects off-site assets.
suggested_action: Define controls for protecting assets used or stored off-premises, including in transit and at home.

name: Storage media
description: Manages storage media through its life cycle of acquisition, use, transportation and disposal in accordance with the classification scheme and handling requirements.
suggested_action: Govern the full lifecycle of storage media, including secure handling, transport and sanitized disposal.

name: Supporting utilities
description: Protects information processing facilities from power failures and other disruptions caused by failures in supporting utilities.
suggested_action: Provide redundant/UPS power and protect against utility failures affecting processing facilities.

name: Cabling security
description: Protects cables carrying power, data or supporting information services from interception, interference or damage.
suggested_action: Protect and segregate power and data cabling against interception, interference and physical damage.

name: Equipment maintenance
description: Maintains equipment correctly to ensure availability, integrity and confidentiality of information.
suggested_action: Maintain equipment per recommended schedules using authorized personnel and protect data during servicing.

name: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
description: Verifies equipment containing storage media to ensure any sensitive data and licensed software is removed or securely overwritten prior to disposal or re-use.
suggested_action: Sanitize or destroy storage media and verify data removal before equipment disposal or reuse.

name: User endpoint devices
description: Protects information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices.
suggested_action: Harden, encrypt and manage endpoint devices and enforce endpoint security configuration baselines.

name: Privileged access rights
description: Restricts and manages the allocation and use of privileged access rights.
suggested_action: Restrict, monitor and time-bound privileged access and review privileged accounts regularly.

name: Information access restriction
description: Restricts access to information and other associated assets in accordance with the established access control policy.
suggested_action: Enforce technical access restrictions to information consistent with classification and least privilege.

name: Access to source code
description: Appropriately manages read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries.
suggested_action: Control and audit access to source code repositories, build tools and libraries.

name: Secure authentication
description: Implements secure authentication technologies and procedures based on information access restrictions and the access control policy.
suggested_action: Enforce strong, risk-based authentication including multi-factor authentication for sensitive access.

name: Capacity management
description: Monitors and adjusts the use of resources in line with current and expected capacity requirements.
suggested_action: Monitor resource utilization and forecast and provision capacity to maintain performance and availability.

name: Protection against malware
description: Implements protection against malware and supports it with appropriate user awareness.
suggested_action: Deploy and maintain anti-malware controls across systems and reinforce with user awareness.

name: Management of technical vulnerabilities
description: Obtains information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use, evaluates the organization's exposure and takes appropriate measures.
suggested_action: Run continuous vulnerability scanning, prioritize by risk and remediate or patch within defined SLAs.

name: Configuration management
description: Establishes, documents, implements, monitors and reviews configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks.
suggested_action: Define secure configuration baselines and continuously monitor and enforce configuration compliance.

name: Information deletion
description: Deletes information stored in information systems, devices or in any other storage media when no longer required.
suggested_action: Implement secure information deletion aligned to retention requirements across systems and media.

name: Data masking
description: Uses data masking in accordance with the access control policy and other related policies and business requirements, taking applicable legislation into consideration.
suggested_action: Apply data masking, pseudonymization or anonymization to limit exposure of sensitive data.

name: Data leakage prevention
description: Applies data leakage prevention measures to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.
suggested_action: Deploy DLP controls to detect and prevent unauthorized exfiltration of sensitive data.

name: Information backup
description: Maintains and regularly tests backup copies of information, software and systems in accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup.
suggested_action: Perform regular backups per policy, store them securely/offsite and test restoration regularly.

name: Redundancy of information processing facilities
description: Implements information processing facilities with redundancy sufficient to meet availability requirements.
suggested_action: Provision redundant processing facilities and failover to meet availability requirements.

name: Logging
description: Produces, stores, protects and analyzes logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events.
suggested_action: Generate, protect and retain comprehensive security logs and centralize them for analysis.

name: Monitoring activities
description: Monitors networks, systems and applications for anomalous behaviour and takes appropriate actions to evaluate potential information security incidents.
suggested_action: Implement continuous monitoring and alerting for anomalies across networks, systems and applications.

name: Clock synchronization
description: Synchronizes the clocks of information processing systems used by the organization to approved time sources.
suggested_action: Synchronize all system clocks to an approved, reliable time source to ensure accurate logging.

name: Use of privileged utility programs
description: Restricts and tightly controls the use of utility programs that can be capable of overriding system and application controls.
suggested_action: Restrict, log and approve use of privileged utility programs that can bypass controls.

name: Installation of software on operational systems
description: Implements procedures and measures to securely manage software installation on operational systems.
suggested_action: Control software installation on production systems via approved, governed change processes.

name: Networks security
description: Secures, manages and controls networks and network devices to protect information in systems and applications.
suggested_action: Secure and manage network devices and traffic with hardening, controls and ongoing oversight.

name: Security of network services
description: Identifies, implements and monitors security mechanisms, service levels and service requirements of network services.
suggested_action: Define and monitor security mechanisms and service levels for all network services, including third-party ones.

name: Segregation of networks
description: Segregates groups of information services, users and information systems in the organization's networks.
suggested_action: Segment networks to isolate sensitive systems, users and services and limit lateral movement.

name: Web filtering
description: Manages access to external websites to reduce exposure to malicious content.
suggested_action: Deploy web filtering to block access to known-malicious and inappropriate external sites.

name: Use of cryptography
description: Defines and implements rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management.
suggested_action: Establish a cryptography policy and key management lifecycle covering algorithms, strength and key handling.

name: Secure development life cycle
description: Establishes and applies rules for the secure development of software and systems.
suggested_action: Define and enforce a secure SDLC integrating security requirements and reviews across development.

name: Application security requirements
description: Identifies, specifies and approves information security requirements when developing or acquiring applications.
suggested_action: Define and approve security requirements for applications during development and acquisition.

name: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
description: Establishes, documents, maintains and applies principles for engineering secure systems to any information system development activities.
suggested_action: Adopt and apply secure architecture and engineering principles (e.g., defense in depth, zero trust) across systems.

name: Secure coding
description: Applies secure coding principles to software development.
suggested_action: Adopt secure coding standards, code review and SAST tooling to prevent common code vulnerabilities.

name: Security testing in development and acceptance
description: Defines and implements security testing processes in the development life cycle.
suggested_action: Integrate security testing (SAST/DAST/pen testing) into development and acceptance gates.

name: Outsourced development
description: Directs, monitors and reviews the activities related to outsourced system development.
suggested_action: Set security requirements for and oversee outsourced development, including code review and testing.

name: Separation of development, test and production environments
description: Separates and secures development, testing and production environments.
suggested_action: Isolate development, test and production environments and control promotion between them.

name: Change management
description: Subjects changes to information processing facilities and information systems to change management procedures.
suggested_action: Operate a formal change management process with risk assessment, approval, testing and rollback plans.

name: Test information
description: Selects, protects and manages test information appropriately.
suggested_action: Protect test data, avoiding use of production sensitive data unless masked and controlled.

name: Protection of information systems during audit testing
description: Plans and agrees audit tests and other assurance activities involving assessment of operational systems between the tester and appropriate management.
suggested_action: Plan and agree audit and assurance testing scope and access to minimize impact on operational systems.
